meta.title: WebberZone Top 10 — GitHub Version
meta.description: Try WebberZone Top 10 from GitHub master branch with pre-imported posts and seeded view counts.
meta.author: webberzone

steps.code:
<?php
require '/wordpress/wp-load.php';

// Get current settings or use defaults
$settings = function_exists('tptn_get_settings') ? tptn_get_settings() : (array) get_option('tptn_settings', array());

// Merge with demo settings
$settings = array_merge($settings, array(
	'add_to' => 'single,page,home',
	'limit' => 10,
	'disp_list_count' => true,
	'show_excerpt' => true,
	'excerpt_length' => 15,
	'show_date' => true,
	'title_length' => 60,
	'thumb_default_show' => true
));

update_option('tptn_settings', $settings);
echo 'Settings updated.';

<?php
require '/wordpress/wp-load.php';
global $wpdb;

$funnel_table = $wpdb->base_prefix . 'top_ten_visits_funnel';
$daily_table = $wpdb->base_prefix . 'top_ten_daily';
$full_table = $wpdb->base_prefix . 'top_ten';
$blog_id = get_current_blog_id();

// Get published posts
$posts = get_posts(array(
	'post_type' => array('post', 'page'),
	'post_status' => 'publish',
	'posts_per_page' => -1,
	'fields' => 'ids',
	'orderby' => 'date',
	'order' => 'DESC'
));

if (empty($posts)) {
	echo 'No posts found.';
	return;
}

// Seed funnel table with visit data
foreach ($posts as $index => $post_id) {
	$base_count = max(25, 1200 - ($index * 30));
	$random_add = mt_rand(0, 150);
	$total_count = $base_count + $random_add;
	
	// Add multiple visits to funnel (simulating real traffic)
	for ($i = 0; $i < $total_count; $i++) {
		$wpdb->insert($funnel_table, array(
			'postnumber' => $post_id,
			'blog_id' => $blog_id,
			'visited_at' => current_time('mysql'),
			'activate_counter' => 11, // Both daily and total
			'source' => 0 // Web traffic
		), array('%d', '%d', '%s', '%d', '%d'));
	}
}

echo 'Seeded ' . count($posts) . ' posts with funnel data.';

<?php
require '/wordpress/wp-load.php';

// Create Popular Posts page
$page_id = wp_insert_post(array(
	'post_title' => 'Popular Posts',
	'post_name' => 'popular-posts',
	'post_status' => 'publish',
	'post_type' => 'page',
	'post_content' => '<!-- wp:shortcode -->[tptn_list heading="0" limit="10"]<!-- /wp:shortcode -->'
));

// Set pretty permalinks
update_option('permalink_structure', '/%postname%/');
flush_rewrite_rules(false);

echo 'Created Popular Posts page (ID: ' . $page_id . ') and set permalinks.';
